already-have-account: Already have an account? Sign in
building-no-title: This page updates on its own when it's ready — you can safely wait here.
building-slow: Still working — a detailed build can take a couple of minutes.
building-with-title: "{{title}}" is coming together. This page updates on its own — you can safely wait here.
connection-lost: Lost the connection before the update finished. Please try again.
cookie-analytics-desc: — Help us understand how visitors interact with the Services by collecting and reporting information anonymously. We use this data to improve performance and usability.
cookie-changes-body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.
cookie-choice-block: Block cookies from being set in future.
cookie-choice-delete: Delete all cookies currently stored on your device.
cookie-choice-first-party: Allow only first-party cookies (blocking third-party cookies).
cookie-choice-notify: Configure browser settings to notify you when a cookie is placed.
cookie-choices-intro: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can typically:
cookie-choices-note: Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the Services. Essential cookies cannot be disabled without impacting your ability to use core features.
cookie-contact-body: If you have questions about how we use cookies, please contact us at
cookie-essential-desc: — Required for the Services to function. These include session tokens, authentication state, and security cookies. They cannot be disabled without impacting functionality.
cookie-how-intro: RMHStudios uses cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
cookie-performance-desc: — Monitor site load times, error rates, and other technical metrics to maintain and improve infrastructure.
cookie-preference-desc: — Used to remember choices you make, such as your selected theme or language preference, so you do not need to re-enter them on each visit.
cookie-retention-body: Session cookies expire when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device until they expire or you delete them. The specific duration of each cookie varies; preference and analytics cookies typically expire within 12 months.
cookie-third-party-body: Some pages on our Services may include content from or links to third-party services (for example, embedded video players or analytics providers). These third parties may set their own cookies, which are governed by their respective privacy and cookie policies. RMHStudios has no control over these cookies.
cookie-what-body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to site owners. Similar technologies — including local storage, session storage, and pixel tags — may be used for comparable purposes and are covered by this policy.
copyright-contact-body: For all copyright-related enquiries, please contact
copyright-dmca-intro: If you believe that your copyrighted work has been reproduced on the Services in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please send a notice containing the following information to
copyright-dmca-item-1: A description of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed.
copyright-dmca-item-2: A description of where the allegedly infringing material is located on the Services, sufficient for us to locate it.
copyright-dmca-item-3: Your contact information, including name, address, telephone number, and email address.
copyright-dmca-item-4: A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the disputed use is not authorised by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law.
copyright-dmca-item-5: A statement, made under penalty of perjury, that the information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorised to act on the copyright owner's behalf.
copyright-dmca-item-6: An electronic or physical signature of the copyright owner or authorised agent.
copyright-ownership-body: Copyright © {{year}} RMHStudios. All rights reserved. The name “RMHStudios”, the name “RMHLink”, the RMHStudios logo, and all associated branding are trademarks or registered trademarks of RMHStudios.
copyright-permitted-use-body: You may access and view content on the Services for your personal, non-commercial use only. You may share links to pages on the Services, provided the links do not imply any endorsement or affiliation beyond what is expressly stated.
copyright-protected-works-body: All content made available through the RMHStudios Services — including but not limited to text, graphics, user interface designs, logos, icons, photographs, audio clips, video clips, 3D models, written descriptions, software code, and the overall look and feel of the Services — is protected by copyright, trade dress, and other intellectual property laws of the relevant jurisdiction.
copyright-restriction-1: Reproduce, publish, or distribute any content from the Services in any medium.
copyright-restriction-2: Create derivative works based on content from the Services, including adaptations, translations, or modifications.
copyright-restriction-3: Use any RMHStudios trademark, logo, or trade name in any manner that could cause confusion, imply false endorsement, or disparage RMHStudios.
copyright-restriction-4: Frame or mirror any part of the Services on any other website or application without our prior written consent.
copyright-restriction-5: Use automated tools to extract, scrape, or reproduce any content from the Services at scale.
copyright-restrictions-intro: Without express prior written permission from RMHStudios, you may not:
copyright-third-party-body: Some content displayed on the Services may be owned by third parties and is used under licence or with permission. Such content remains the property of the respective owners. RMHStudios makes no claim to ownership of third-party content.
customize-placeholder: Make it darker, add a pricing section, more neon…
generation-failed-hint: Generation didn't complete. Give it another go.
generic-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
history-branch-hint: Hit Customize to branch a new version from the one you're viewing.
no-account: Don't have an account? Sign up
not-found-hint: This page doesn't exist (or never did).
passkey-error: Passkey sign-in was cancelled or failed.
post-not-embeddable: This post isn’t available to embed.
privacy-s1-body: RMHStudios (“we”, “us”, or “our”) is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that data when you use our Services.
privacy-s10-body: The Services are not directed at individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such data, please contact us immediately.
privacy-s11-body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the updated policy on this page and revise the “Last updated” date. For material changes, we will make reasonable efforts to notify you.
privacy-s2-direct-body: — such as your name, email address, or any other information you submit when requesting early access, contacting us, or creating an account.
privacy-s2-intro: We may collect the following categories of information:
privacy-s2-technical-body: — such as IP address, browser type and version, operating system, and screen resolution.
privacy-s2-usage-body: — including pages visited, features used, time spent on the Services, referring URLs, and device identifiers.
privacy-s3-intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy-s3-item1: Provide, maintain, and improve the Services.
privacy-s3-item2: Process early-access requests and communicate with you about your access status.
privacy-s3-item3: Understand how the Services are used so we can improve them.
privacy-s3-item4: Detect, prevent, and address security incidents and abuse.
privacy-s3-item6: Send you product updates and announcements, where you have opted in.
privacy-s4-body: If you are located in the European Economic Area or the United Kingdom, our legal bases for processing your personal data include: your consent, the performance of a contract with you, compliance with a legal obligation, and our legitimate interests (such as improving our Services and preventing fraud), where such interests are not overridden by your rights.
privacy-s4-heading: 4. Legal Basis for Processing (EEA / UK Users)
privacy-s5-authorities-body: — when required by law, legal process, or to protect the rights and safety of RMHStudios, our users, or the public.
privacy-s5-intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
privacy-s5-providers-body: — trusted third parties that help us operate the Services (e.g., hosting, analytics, email delivery), bound by appropriate data processing agreements.
privacy-s5-transfers-body: — in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, subject to standard confidentiality protections.
privacy-s6-body: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this Policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. When data is no longer needed, we securely delete or anonymise it.
privacy-s7-body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, as well as the right to data portability and the right to object to certain processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
privacy-s8-body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy-s9-body: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We take steps to ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection law, including the use of standard contractual clauses where required.
signin-subheading: Sign in to access your profile.
signup-subheading: Make an identity to access the platform.
terms-conduct-1: Use the Services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable law or regulation.
terms-conduct-2: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any portion of the Services or any related systems or networks.
terms-conduct-3: Transmit any harmful, offensive, or disruptive content through the Services.
terms-conduct-4: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Services.
terms-conduct-5: Use automated means (bots, scrapers, crawlers) to access or collect data from the Services without prior written consent.
terms-conduct-6: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Services.
terms-p-acceptance: By accessing or using any RMHStudios website, product, or service (collectively, the “Services”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Services. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access the Services.
terms-p-beta: Certain features of the Services, including RMHLink, are in early access or beta. These features are provided without warranty of any kind and may be modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time. Your use of early access features is entirely at your own risk.
terms-p-changes: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Services after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms. We encourage you to review these Terms periodically.
terms-p-contact-before: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at
terms-p-description: RMHStudios provides access to an early-stage platform encompassing RMHLink (a brain-computer interface research initiative), interactive experiences, media tools, and related digital products. The Services are provided on an “as available” basis and are subject to change without notice.
terms-p-disclaimers: THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED “AS IS” AND “AS AVAILABLE” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. RMHSTUDIOS DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICES WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, OR SECURE.
terms-p-eligibility: You must be at least 18 years of age to use the Services. By using the Services you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement and that you have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.
terms-p-governing-law: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which RMHStudios is registered, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms-p-ip: All content, features, and functionality of the Services — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, 3D models, software, and the overall look and feel — are the exclusive property of RMHStudios or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, or exploit any such content without our express prior written permission.
terms-p-liability: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, RMHSTUDIOS AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICES, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.
terms-p-privacy-after-link: , which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. Please review it carefully.
terms-p-privacy-before-link: Your use of the Services is also governed by our
version-unavailable: That version is no longer available.
